highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: Which is the toughest subject in B.Tech Electrical Engineering course?
faqs.answer: The subject that is tough for you might be very easy to study and grasp for your friend, who finds it interesting. For example, you may find Electromagnetic Wave Theory very tough because of the various technicalities and Engineering theory that it deals with. But, for your friend, it might be fun to learn, as it gives them a channel to learn, explore, and experiment with something new.

faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT)?
faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) is around INR 136940 - INR 360240.

placements.overview:
Established in 1980, SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) is located in Chitradurga, Karnataka. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 12 courses offered by the Institute are available across stream such as Engineering. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,36,940 to 9,20,000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,36,940 to 9,20,000.

faqs.answer: A:    SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) are Automobile Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Structural Engineering.
faqs.question: What specializations do SJM Institute of Technology (SJMIT) offer in their courses?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good Placements and Nice Infrastructure but Can Be Improved.

review_content.Placements: In our college, there will be regular internships for final-year students, making them well-trained for placements. A minimum of 80-90% of the students will get placed in the training center. Companies such as Wipro and other training centers are held regularly.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has good facilities for washrooms, drinking water, parking, playgrounds, courts, etc. Wi-Fi is available in the department of each course. The library is well-maintained and has lots of books; a digital library is also available. The sports section is also well-maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students are placed in our course. Almost 50% of students get internships from our course. The top courses offered in our courses are civil engineering, computer science and engineering, electrical and electronics engineering, electronics and communication engineering, and mechanical engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, and a library are provided. The facilities in the hostel are very good, and the food served is also good. Medical facilities and sports like sports functions are available. Counseling is aimed at making students take responsibility for their own decisions to become more aware of their resources.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college, and I felt much comfortable with the lecturers and environment.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students get placed every year. 4-7 LPA is the average salary package offered. Adobe, Amazon, Infosys, Bosch, Accenture, IBM and Cisco are some companies that came to our college. The students are provided with some training under Cisco. Our college has a tie-up with Cisco.
review_content.Infrastructure: High-speed Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. Labs are quite good and clean. Classrooms are big and neat with proper ventilation. The library is very big with great books for all the branches. Our library has a big reading section. A digital library is also available to use the internet.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: If your really from Chitradurga then it's okay to join.

review_content.Placements: No placement opportunity for mechanical engineers. But mass recruitment activities and poll campus drive available for some times you can crack it. If you are really talented then definitely you will survive any where in the nation. Try to work hard.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is below average. Small buildings small campus. College located on the outskirts of the city. But transportation from anywhere from the city takes below 30 months. Library area is good, Wi-Fi and labs facilities available. Classrooms are having digital facilities like projector.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good for who those study only for the certificate.

review_content.Placements: 1: Placements are arranged from the college but very less. 2: Salary between 20000 to 25000 and only 1 to 3 members got the job. 3: no top companies came for placements. 4: machine operator for mechanical course is the role. Students have to look on their own for internships as the college will not provide any.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1; All facilities offered by the college are good recently Wi-Fi facilities are arranged. library is like a hotspot for mechanical students because. 2; I'm staying in a BCM engineering hostel only for engineering students provided by the government and I spent 4 years of engineering life in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty members are good, but the campus placements are poor.

review_content.Placements: The college is good. The teaching staff is well-experienced and supportive. They support a lot during projects and seminars. But the campus is poor, and job opportunity is poor. I have attended two interviews at my college, and from them, I got selected for one company, but I didn't get an offer letter. I have contacted the placement officer but he told you can contact the company directly, so I have contacted the company, but they did not respond to my call and email. Most of the students were happy when they get a job, but no one got an offer letter. For seniors, they did not even provide the interview itself. Some people got the offer letter, but that is consultancy as we have to pay Rs. 35,000 to that consultancy.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members are good, but the campus placements are poor.
reviews.review_text: The campus is large, but the maintenance and roads are very poor. In fee slip, they received the Wi-Fi fee, but there is no Wi-Fi connection on the campus. There is no medical facility at all near the campus. There is one sports room, but that is small. The sports materials are old on the campus, and there is no proper training, but the physical director is supportive, but the college didn't support him. There is no proper fan facility in classrooms. There is no proper canteen facility as there ...

reviews.review_heading: Good college for local residents.
reviews.review_text: The college has no Wi-Fi facility. Labs, classrooms, library, sports, games, everything is good. The quality of the labs and classrooms are average. Lecturers are good in our branch. There are many canteens available nearby surroundings of the college. Girls and boys hostel facility is available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Life in SJMIT college, chitradurga.
reviews.review_text: Good and standard type of teaching is provided. Classrooms are big enough, and there is less number of input (students). There are only a few students in the class, and only one section is there for every branch. The staff are good, and the labs are well, but the equipment is old.

reviews.review_heading: It is a more preferable college.
reviews.review_text: About the infrastructure, the Wi-Fi is available only in the library. We have a huge book storage in college and in sports, we guys had huge enjoyment in our college. The campus of the college is good, but it's still under construction for the other departments. Also, more classes are going to be constructed.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied as it helps students for their better future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The hostel is sufficient. The canteen is good. Other facilities like toilets and water facility are also good. The environment is good. The playground and others like parking and security are very good. The separate blocks and separate infrastructures are provided for several activities which will be the encouragement to the students.

reviews.review_heading: A satisfied engineer from SJM Institute of Technology, Karnataka.
reviews.review_text: This institute is a reputed technical institute where all the needful facilities are available like the Wi-Fi facility in the hostels as well,  a playground, the girl's and boy's hostels, many indoor game premises, a quality mess and some cafeteria are situated within the college premises.

reviews.review_heading: SJMIT college - good and average college.
reviews.review_text: There are no proper labs and Wi-Fi. Morethan the lecturers, the attendees have more knowledge. The library is nice, but they will issue only two books per individual. That too for general students two books but sc/st receives four books. No medical facilities, no sports and games. The classrooms are nice. The canteens are bad. The hostel rooms are nice.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, average infrastructure and awesome faculty.
reviews.review_text: The labs were good. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. The classrooms have good infrastructure and the library is good. All old authors textbooks are available. The quality of labs is average. The quality of food is poor in canteens and the hostel rooms are of no use. We faced some problems regarding the infrastructure, but we were helpless.

Chitradurga is a small city and SJMIT is the only engineering college in there for now. Many other colleges have been proposed to be opened in the near future. highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Shri Gulabrao Deokar College Of Engineering:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shri Gulabrao Deokar College Of Engineering provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Architecture & Planning, and have a fee structure of around INR 40,000 to 2,44,000. answer.text: Shri Gulabrao Deokar College Of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent. OR Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject. M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor Degree in the relevant field from AICTE or Central or State Government approved institutions or equivalent, with above mentioned marks (at least 45% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and persons with disability belonging to Maharashtra State only). Candidate appeared for the final year examination of Bachelor's degree in any discipline to be awarded by any of the Universities recognised by UGC or AIU are also eligible to apply.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University can also apply. faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Shri Gulabrao Deokar College Of Engineering for UG/PG courses?

rows:
Candidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.

Candidate must have completed Bachelor Degree in the relevant field from AICTE or Central or State Government approved institutions or equivalent, with above mentioned marks (at least 45% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and persons with disability belonging to Maharashtra State only).
For sponsored candidates, candidate must have minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

Candidate must have completed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline or its equivalent awarded by any of the Universities recognized by UGC or AIU and secure atleast 50% marks in aggregate or equivalent (at least 45% in case of candidates of backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only). 

Candidate appeared for the final year examination of Bachelor's degree in any discipline to be awarded by any of the Universities recognised by UGC or AIU are also eligible to apply.

Candidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University can also apply.
Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Gulabrao Deokar College Of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied about the greenery and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Not much off campus placements are there. Students need to reach themselves to the companies, however training is provided by the college in the 6th sem. The off campus the highest package was upto 6 Lacs per annum and the roles that offered are associate, manager, engineer etc.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and facilities. Wi-Fi facility is there in classrooms as well as in library and in hostels. Mess and canteens are there and good food is available. Medical facility is also available in the campus. However, projectors are not available in campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure, facilities, and placements.

content.Placements: Offline placements are more. Placements are good on campus. Students need to attend interview rounds for the selection. The highest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. All students got internship opportunities. Top roles offered are project associate, project manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities such as Wi-Fi, clean classrooms, a library, a mess, a canteen, sports, medical facilities, etc. Chemicals are available for research scholars for research work.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good, helpful, and knowledgeable. They use projectors for bright learning. They are highly qualified. The teaching quality is good. We are satisfied with the quality of the teaching. It makes students ready for the industry. Semester exams are not much difficult.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure but a lack of facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are very rare; not all the students got placed. Off-campus placements are there. The highest package offered was around INR 3.5 lacs by TCS, Capgemini, and Infosys in off-campus drives. Roles such as associate, manager, and project manager are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are there. Hostels, a mess, and a canteen are also on the campus. A Wi-Fi facility is there, and a library is also there for studying. The quality of the food is good, and a medical facility is also there. A sports facility is there in the playground.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with good infrastructure and overall good facilities.

content.Placements: Off-campus placements are more common than on-campus placements. The average salary given is around INR 25k per month for freshers, while experienced students get a good salary. Internships are provided to the students. The recruiting companies are very few, such as TCS, Capgemini, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really awesome, and it's a good place for students because the environment is also nice. A Wi-Fi facility is provided on campus and in the college. Classrooms are not that good. There is a lack of facilities in classrooms. AC is not there in the classrooms. The canteen and mess facilities in hostels are clean, and hygiene is maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college but facilities are not decent.

content.Placements: Placements are average in this college. The minimum salary offered was Rs 25,000 per month. Few students got internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Our campus has good environment. Wi-Fi, classrooms, canteen, and hostels are available. Laboratory is not good. The food served in the mess is average.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good. Few of them are not helpful. The teaching quality is average. The course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for the industry.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest this college for economically weak category students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in the college is good. Our college has a good canteen, and the quality of the food served in the canteen is the best. The hostel quality is poor, and the hostel infrastructure is bad. Sports facilities are good. The college has well-operated labs. It also has a good Wi-Fi connection.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but there are some disadvantages also.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a good environment. Wi-Fi was available, but the conditions of labs were bad. Classrooms were not cleaned properly. Sports facility was not proper at our college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of poor placements, poor practical knowledge, good events, library.
reviews.review_text:
1. Labs, classrooms, library were good, Wi-Fi service set at end of our batch, before that there was no Wi-Fi. 
2. Course was just okay, not much good. 
3. Conclusion- infrastructure of college campus was good, hostels were average, canteen was the worst, and there was big ground to play sports. Note: All data mentioned above is according to me only.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because Fees is so minimum as per giving facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: So many facilities in Our college, infrastructure is so good looking so much beautiful. Mechanical, Computer, Civil and other department is also good. Architecture course available in our college, Boys and Girls both hostel is available here, Big Sports Ground Basketball Ground.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and the campus is also big. The college provides free Wi-Fi facility to students for education purpose. There is a good atmosphere for students in the campus, and good quality of labs and classrooms are provided. Food provided in the canteen and the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, but absolutely disappointed because of zero placements in 2016.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. All types of facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, sports and games, etc., which are essential for students are available. Quality of food in the canteen is good. Hostel rooms are clean and neat.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended for needy urban students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for architecture branch and the mechanical branch was amazing. But, construction is under process for computer science and electronics and telecommunications branches. There are three buildings, one main building consist of head office and architecture department, one building has mechanical, and another huge one has CSE, TC and library.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus and college for students who has financial problems.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is quite good, but the facility of benches is poor, and the library is good, but in medical facilities are not available at all. Here, Wi-Fi is only available for the laptops with connection with only the near-by servers which means a poor connection. Also, sports and games facility is available for those who have a leader in college only. Otherwise, no chance to participate.

The college is good in terms of classrooms, library and labs. It is very much disciplined with good faculty. Cons are lacking of appropriate hostel and is situated very far from the market. Low placement rates are of little concern alongside preference of local students over outsiders. It has an educated teaching staff and there is no unprofessional or greedy staff. description: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

The Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing rank was 384820 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Engineering. The first round cutoff

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 384820 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 537796 in 2023 and 347132 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering demonstrated fluctuating trend.

Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 84.76, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science. Refer to the table below to see the first and last-round cutoff percentiles for various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations for General category students b

Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 84.76. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 12.56 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Flora Institute of Technology:

reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and average infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: During our time, most of the placement opportunities were offered to students of the mechanical department. Don't depend on the college for placements. Many of the students found internships by themselves. There is no scope for anything here right now, and the case was different during our time.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average, but I don't recommend joining this college right now. The library was good, and the canteen was average. The computer labs were good, and there is a need to upgrade them. Everything else was good. There were facilities for games, but the college didn't encourage sports during our time.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Flora Institute of Technology infrastructure is good with natural surroundings.

review_content.Placements: The Flora College is very good for teaching. But, for placements, they need to do hard work because this college is newly built and quantity of students is also less. So, they need to look into the placements issue. They give placements but are not satisfactory.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is awesome. They provide all the facilities. College location is in Khopi village, i.e., 25-30km long from Pune. It has natural atmosphere outside. Food quality is also good. College does not provide sports and games facilities, but other facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of good teachers.

review_content.Placements: Good placement opportunity available in this college. New tpo sir are taking efforts to provide placement for students. Passed out students were placed in tata Cummins mahindra and other companies including isro and many more. They are trying their best to provide placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is still developing. College has two open playgrounds. Table tennis is available for hostel students and even gym is also available for hostel students with negligible fees of 10 rupees per month. Two canteens are available in college premises.

individual_reviews.title: It is not the best college as I wanted, but it gives us a lot of memories.

content.Placements: None of the students from our batch got placed. The mechanical engineering department is the main department of our college. Companies do not visit our college for placements. Our college does not take responsibility to provide an internship.
content.Infrastructure: There is only one mechanical workshop for students where various machines are placed for the practical study of students. The hostel facility is average. Mess and canteen facilities are the worst. Classrooms are comfortable for students. There are various labs like thermodynamics lab, FM lab and Cad Cam lab.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: This is not a bad choice but think twice before joining.

content.Placements: The placement cell in the college is good, and it is helpful for all students to improve their skills. Regularly, they arrange workshops and guests lectures for students. They provide internships and job details to students regularly. Placement cell is collaborating with numerous organisations to place students in their company/organisation.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. In a single campus, there are Flora Institute of Technology, Flora College of Architecture, and Flora valley School. In engineering, there are well-equipped labs and workshops. There is a hostel in the college, so no need to travel long.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and average infrastructure.

content.Placements: During our time, most of the placement opportunities were offered to students of the mechanical department. Don't depend on the college for placements. Many of the students found internships by themselves. There is no scope for anything here right now, and the case was different during our time.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average, but I don't recommend joining this college right now. The library was good, and the canteen was average. The computer labs were good, and there is a need to upgrade them. Everything else was good. There were facilities for games, but the college didn't encourage sports during our time.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Flora Institute of Technology infrastructure is good with natural surroundings.

content.Placements: The Flora College is very good for teaching. But, for placements, they need to do hard work because this college is newly built and quantity of students is also less. So, they need to look into the placements issue. They give placements but are not satisfactory.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is awesome. They provide all the facilities. College location is in Khopi village, i.e., 25-30km long from Pune. It has natural atmosphere outside. Food quality is also good. College does not provide sports and games facilities, but other facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of good teachers.

content.Placements: Good placement opportunity available in this college. New tpo sir are taking efforts to provide placement for students. Passed out students were placed in tata Cummins mahindra and other companies including isro and many more. They are trying their best to provide placement.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is still developing. College has two open playgrounds. Table tennis is available for hostel students and even gym is also available for hostel students with negligible fees of 10 rupees per month. Two canteens are available in college premises.

reviews.review_text: The Arasu Engineering College campus and environment were very nice. More comfortable classrooms and hi-tech laboratory facilities are available at this college. Full campus Wi-Fi and CCTV camera facilities are available. Boys and girls hostel facilities are available in this college. Hostel food tastes good. This college has a limited number of sports grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Arasu engineering college is absolutely the best college .
reviews.review_text: Arasu engineering college infrastructure was very good. More machines laboratory and computer, electrical laboratories are available for this college. This college canteen facilities also available. Separate hostel also here this college. Hostel foods is very hygienic and tasty .

reviews.review_heading: College life is heaven, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but most probably they not gave permission to access, labs are good enough for the environment such that good environment gives peace to the mind and gave interest in studies, library literally every one gets benefit from every books, mess food is not enough good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Arasu Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: We are strictly not allowed to use mobiles and two wheelers in college. There is no Wi-Fi. Labs are very small, and the staff are very few. Food is not up to the mark. They don't offer non-vegetarian foods. There are no well-trained sports staff. The management is not willing to encourage sports. There are no medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of college faculty and management.
reviews.review_text: We paid library fees for every year but they didn't allot a library period. We can go only in a interval or lunch break. They said free wi-fi available in college but they didn't offer a network. Lab's are really good and more number of system are available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facility.
reviews.review_text: Mobile phone and bike is not allowed in college campus. The college buses come from all surrounding areas. Library and lab also good, campus infrastructure was awesome. Wi-Fi free for all lab. Boys hostel is inside of college. Canteen is better. Sports was good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is one of the most top colleges in our area.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure, and it has a Wi-Fi facility. Our college has a huge library, gym for students, a huge playground for cricket and football and separate ground for basketball. There are also indoor games facilities, and our college provides food for all students with less fees. Home goods are not allowed.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Arasu Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, considering the surrounding. Mobiles or any electronic devices are not allowed in our college, and they will check your bags without your permission and gather all your devices and will fine you with Rs. 20,000. You should pay that fine otherwise you are not allowed to attend the classes. The worst part is they won't give your phone even after you paid the fine. The food served here was below average (it's very common in Indian colleges). Sports in our ...

reviews.review_heading: A good college for those students who concentrate only on studies and nothing else.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms, library and lab facilities are very good at Arasu Engineering College. There is no facility for the medical. The hostel rooms are very good and well maintained. The canteen food is somewhat poor. At the infrastructure side, there is no issue. Wi-Fi facility will be available in 2 months.

reviews.review_heading: Well satisfying college for parents as well as students with the silent environment for students.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and library facilities are very good. The library contains enough books for students and also contain more journals. There is no Wi-Fi on the college campus, and the mobile phone is restricted to the students. The lab facility is very good. The canteen facility is somewhat poor. The hostel facility is good. The medical facility is available. Every year, Symposiums, workshops and other events are conducted by all the departments. The students avail their government scholarships.

reviews.review_heading: Guided with good discipline and developed our personality.
reviews.review_text: Mobile phones were not allowed when we studied. But for final-year students, we could use laptops for projects and access the college Wi-Fi. We had all labs equipped with all equipment and a library with an updated collection. There were also clean canteen facilities for all.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good professors and good hostel.
reviews.review_text:
1. Peaceful classrooms with 6 tube lights and 4 fans in our class. There are projectors in our classroom. There is a separate library for our branch.
2. Veg and Non-veg food are separately available in our hostel. Both boys hostel and girls hostel have good security with 6 watchmen and full surveillance camera.

reviews.review_heading: An institute with average placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus was not enabled with Wi-Fi until then, but now, it is. There was proper internet connectivity for students. The library has a good collection of books along with an online library. Classrooms were digitised.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of Computer Science and Engineering from 2026 passing out batch. Our college is average in terms of placement provision. In our college, around 50% of students get placements. The highest salary package offered in our college is 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies in our college are Wipro, Accenture, Tech Mahindra, TCS, and Global Logic. Roles offered in our college are Analyst and Developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is best in terms of infrastructure, with good classrooms, labs for every department, a big library, and free Wi-Fi facility. Quality of facilities in our college and hostel is good. College has all types of transport facilities. Food available in mess and canteen is excellent. College provides free medical facilities and many sports grounds for every sport in our college.

reviews_list.review_title: The sad reality of private colleges.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 80% of students got placed in our college. The highest package offered in our college was nearly 12 LPA, and the average package offered in our college was around 4-4.5 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: Some faculty members are not sufficiently qualified according to teaching standards, and labs are in okay condition and not fully enough to meet students' needs. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The worst college you'll ever join.

content.Placements: There are absolutely no placements related to the course, just a few startups have shown up, and they are offering less than what a domestic house help would receive on a monthly basis. There are no IT jobs, and all placements that are shown outside on billboards are fake.
content.Infrastructure: It’s fine, buildings are huge, but there is no maintenance. The infrastructure is good, but again, don’t judge a book by its cover. Hence, don’t join this college just because it has nice infrastructure, because it is a waste of time and money to join. I made the same mistake by joining it only because of the infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I'm not satisfied with the college and course because of no placements and poor teaching quality.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students got placed from our course. The regular salary package offered in our course is 3 LPA. Accenture and Test Yantra are the regular recruiting companies in our batch. Main roles offered are application developer and software engineer. Overall placements are bad.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are available with projectors. Labs are nice with good computer systems and air-conditioners. Libraries are equipped with all course books, newspapers, and research. Hostels provide quality food and facilities but are quite expensive for both boys and girls and they are near to the college too.

individual_reviews.title: Expectations vs. Reality of the College.

content.Placements: I am pursuing CSE in Data Science. There's no specific highest or lowest package for our college since we only get one company, and that is Accenture. The percentage of internships offered in our college is 5%. My course offers me a job as a data analyst, which is more advanced and useful for companies.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not satisfied with the college and course because of no placements and poor teaching quality.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are available with projectors. Labs are nice with good computer systems and air-conditioners. Libraries are equipped with all course books, newspapers, and research. Hostels provide quality food and facilities but are quite expensive for both boys and girls and they are near to the college too.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with average infrastructure facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is best in terms of infrastructure, with good classrooms, labs for every department, a big library, and free Wi-Fi facility. Quality of facilities in our college and hostel is good. College has all types of transport facilities. Food available in mess and canteen is excellent. College provides free medical facilities and many sports grounds for every sport in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The sad reality of private colleges.
reviews.review_text: Some faculty members are not sufficiently qualified according to teaching standards, and labs are in okay condition and not fully enough to meet students' needs. The food we have to buy from the canteen, and the games are good at the beginning and gradually decrease to none.

reviews.review_heading: Expectations vs. Reality of the College.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, programming labs, and a library in our college. However, the canteen serves worse food than we expected, and the prices are very high. The games we can play in our college include basketball and cricket, but those who like soccer won’t have the opportunity to play.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied by the faculty .
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. Our college provides greenboard, smart classrooms for digital lectures, well designed labs with all kinds of apparatus, small play ground which has net, cricket, kabaddi ground and volleyball court, canteen etc.

reviews.review_heading: Below average college with no infrastructure and bad teaching.
reviews.review_text: Our college is average in terms of infrastructure because our college does not have big ground and their are no proper labs in college. Our college has facilities like a canteen, Wi-Fi, labs, and library. Our college is best in sports and games, where every month they conduct a sports.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend this college for others.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. We have digital classrooms, projectors to give seminars, labs with good systems, and a and a library with good stock. Everything is available. Different blocks for different departments. The hostel facility is available for both girls and boys separately. Homely food is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with this college. I recommend this college for others.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of this college are too good. This college has a peaceful environment. Digital classrooms, projectors, labs, libraries—everything is available. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. They provide homely food. Hot water, Wi-Fi, CC cameras—everything is available.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. This college is located in a peaceful environment with greenery. Digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, labs with good computer systems, a library with a good collection of books—everything is available. The hostel facility is available for both boys and girls. All varieties of food are available at the canteen. They maintain canteen hygiene. Hostels have sports hours and study hours.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with this college. This College provides good placements.

There is a hostel facility for both girls and boys. They provide homely food. They keep the hostel hygienic. Study hours and sport hours are all there.

reviews.review_heading: I love this college. I recommend this college for upcoming students.

Library with a good collection of books. There is a hostel facility for both girls and boys separately. They provide homely food. And they maintain the hostel well. They provide security.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, I recommend this college. This college has good placements.

description: Dattakala Institute Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:

Dattakala Institute cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 354180 and 637326 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 354180, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 322006.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 354180.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of the faculty, a peaceful environment to grow your mind

review_content.Placements: 70% will be placed. The highest package was 1,50,000 and the lowest was 50,000. Intel, Google, and Amazon were some of the companies. Internships aren't encouraged here. Voice and non-voice both were offered in the placements. Students need to have a grip on computer languages to excel in their placements.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, but I'm not satisfied with the staff members.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of the students in our college got placements. The average salary package is around 1 LPA to 3 LPA. The top companies that came to our college placements to recruit are Wipro and Infotech. The top roles that were offered for our course are CEO and manager, HR, and freelance jobs. We are getting average salaries for these roles. Some companies offer lower salaries, but in the CSE department, we have a lot of jobs to get.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in our college is average.

review_content.General: College had building but not much good. Wi-Fi did not work properly and labs were very old and dusty. Computer did not run fast. Library was open but not much books there. Hostel room was small and bed was not good. Mess food was very bad in taste and sometimes not clean. No sports, no games, and only boring life. Medical things were also not available. Hostel was not value for money, they took much fee but nothing was given properly. Wi-Fi was not working and food was very bad in mess. Sports items all broken, and the game did not play properly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: An average college for an average student who just want a degree.

review_content.Placements: Placement is not good much, only some students got job rest not. I think 20 percent student got placed only. High package is 5 LPA but only 1 person got that, most people get like 2 LPA or less. The lowest is like stypend type 10k or nothing. Company come are not good, small startups mostly. No big name. Internship not easy also, only few like 10-15 percent get some intern. Top role is like sales job or support job, no core job. Not much dev or teach work, mostly BPO type. Many friends try but not even get call.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infra not good at all. Wi-Fi slow like 2g, some time not work full day. Lab is old machines and no new software. Library small and many books not there. Class have fan only no AC, so hot in summer. Hostel room dirty, bathroom so bad sell all time. Mess food is not tasty, every day same thing, many student get stomach issue. No good doctor or medical thing also. Game and sport nothing big, only small ground and no proper equipment. Over all not nice place for stay or study.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Dr. K. N. M. I. E. T. Review.

review_content.Placements: 80% students are placed in this course. The highest package of the course is 8 LPA, and the lowest package of the course is 3.5 LPA, and the average package of the course is 3.5 LPA. TCS is the top company recruiter in this course. 100% of the students got internships in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average, but Wi-Fi is available for everyone. The library is good for everyone, and the classroom is also good. In the hostel, Wi-Fi, hot water for everyone, and 24-hour electricity are available. Canteen, medical facilities, and sports and games are available.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.answer: The subject that is tough for you might be very easy to study and grasp for your friend, who finds it interesting. But, for your friend, it might be fun to learn, as it gives them a channel to learn, explore, and experiment with something new.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. K.N Modi Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with placement but the infrastructure of the college is just above par.

content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed in the previous year. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and average salary offered is 5 LPA. Every year, various companies visit our college offering placements in various posts with a good package as well as facilities.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is average, and the classes are conducted regularly. The structure of lab and libraries is very good, and guidance is also provided by the faculty members of the college according to their knowledge. Wi-Fi and computers are also good and working.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: About BBA course - Value for money or not?

content.Placements: In our batch not much students got placed maybe like 20 percent only got jobs. Companies did not come regularly for placements, only some small ones like local startups. Package was also not good. The highest salary was 4 LPA. The average salary was 2 LPA. Some students got nothing. Internships also did not happen much, only few students got them in local shops or unknown companies. Roles were mostly like support or sales, not technical or good roles. So, overall placements were not good very below average.
content.Infrastructure: College had building but not much good. Wi-Fi did not work properly and labs were very old and dusty. Computer did not run fast. Library was open but not much books there. Hostel room was small and bed was not good. Mess food was very bad in taste and sometimes not clean. No sports, no games, and only boring life. Medical things were also not available. Hostel was not value for money, they took much fee but nothing was given properly. Wi-Fi was not working and food was very bad in mess. Sports items all broken, and the game did not play properly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: An average college for an average student who just want a degree.

content.Placements: Placement is not good much, only some students got job rest not. I think 20 percent student got placed only. High package is 5 LPA but only 1 person got that, most people get like 2 LPA or less. The lowest is like stypend type 10k or nothing. Company come are not good, small startups mostly. No big name. Internship not easy also, only few like 10-15 percent get some intern. Top role is like sales job or support job, no core job. Not much dev or teach work, mostly BPO type. Many friends try but not even get call.
content.Infrastructure: Infra not good at all. Wi-Fi slow like 2g, some time not work full day. Lab is old machines and no new software. Library small and many books not there. Class have fan only no AC, so hot in summer. Hostel room dirty, bathroom so bad sell all time. Mess food is not tasty, every day same thing, many student get stomach issue. No good doctor or medical thing also. Game and sport nothing big, only small ground and no proper equipment. Over all not nice place for stay or study.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dr. K. N. M. I. E. T. Review.

content.Placements: 80% students are placed in this course. The highest package of the course is 8 LPA, and the lowest package of the course is 3.5 LPA, and the average package of the course is 3.5 LPA. TCS is the top company recruiter in this course. 100% of the students got internships in this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average, but Wi-Fi is available for everyone. The library is good for everyone, and the classroom is also good. In the hostel, Wi-Fi, hot water for everyone, and 24-hour electricity are available. Canteen, medical facilities, and sports and games are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: One of the best institute in india .

content.Placements: There are all students placed in this college Top recruiting company is TCS Wipro chetu software ibm tahles group Top role course in computer Science engineering Information technology Heigest okg 42 loa offer the lowest pakgis 3lpa Avg package in 6lpa All students provide the college internship .
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi 24*7 in class room and hostal good facilities Food quality is good healthy and tasty food quality is good for students Department is very supportive and training Certificate for the month end with provide I proud of the college one of the best college in Delhi ncr .

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college at low fees.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The quality of the hostel is very good. Mess food and facilities are average. Playground is available. Medical facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with our college because of the type of infrastructure and facilities it provides.
reviews.review_text: I stayed in a hostel in the air-conditioned wing for all four years. It was better than the non-air-conditioning wing, but during the rainy season, walls of the rooms got damp with moisture. In a mess, only daytime food was good. I was totally dependent on canteen and outside food. Medical facilities were not good. There were no sports or game clubs in hostel and college. Wi-Fi was provided in college as well as in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. K.N Modi Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and hostel are very good. The library is very good with all types of books. Newspapers and previous years' question papers are also provided by the college. The food served in the hostel is good. The canteen area is also good.

reviews.review_heading: In 2021, not run proper placements drive but lots of students get placements outside this college.
reviews.review_text: On our campus, there are many facilities, but they are average. Laboratories are not good and the classrooms are average. It has a good library for the students. The hostel facility is very good in our college and they provide good quality of mess and canteen. The medical facilities are also very good. It also provides sports like cricket and swimming.

reviews.review_heading: It provides average placements and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available on campus. Classrooms are average, and the library is good. The hostel is average. The quality of the food needs to be improved. The food served in the canteen is good. The infrastructure needs to be improved. The building is very old and needs renovation. Labs classes need to be added because it provides practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: In the past, our college is one of the best colleges in AKTU.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel is good. The canteen is good. The infrastructure of our college is not good, and it is below average. A Wi-Fi facility is available. Labs and classrooms are good enough to sit and read. The library is quite good to read peacefully. The food served in a mess is not good enough to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. K.N Modi Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Almost all the facilities were available in our hostel like swimming pool, basketball court, volleyball ground, table tennis, gymnastics, canteen, medical facilities, etc. All the facilities were not accessible all the time for all students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the  infrastructure and teachers. Labs are available as per our choice.

Labs and library are available in our college. A practical lab is available with necessary machines and instruments. The classrooms are very good. There are air-conditioned and non- air-conditioned hostels available. The food served in the hostel is good. Medical facilities are also available in hostel for 24x7. The sports games are ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. K.N Modi Institute of Engineering and Technology.

The library was super clean, and books and the magazines were updated regularly in the library. Newspapers were available in different languages.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Radharaman Engineering College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Radharaman Engineering College offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for Radharaman Engineering College courses range between INR 36,000 to 85,200.

In our course, the highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 5 LPA. Nearly 95% of the students got an internship in Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Indian Army, TCS, and many other reputed companies. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our department is sufficient for all our classmates. There are 3 computer labs for our department with a wide range of LAN for internet connectivity. Each classroom has a capacity of 60 students. A central library is also available, but there is no Wi-Fi access.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for engineering in Bhopal.

content.Placements: About 90% of students get placed at our college. The highest salary package offered is 21 LPA, and the average salary package offered ranges from 3.5-5 LPA. For taking admission in B tech computer science engineering, students should have above 70% marks in equivalent 10th and 12th with science. The admission process is based on JEE Mains and also through 12th marks. The admission process is simple. Interested students can go through the official website of the college. Companies like TCS, Tavisca, Accenture, etc., offered an internship with a stipend that ranges from Rs. 10,000-15,000 per month. Top roles offered to students are data science, machine learning, artificial intelligence, software development, and web development with projects and outcomes.

paragraphs: Radharaman Engineering College admissions are based on merit. college_info.intro:
The Sri Ranganathar Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels through its various departments such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Mechanical engineering, and Science & Humanities, among others.
At the UG level, SRIET Coimbatore offers the BTech and BE programmes in various branches such as Agricultural Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology, Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Food Technology, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Machine Learning.
The BTech programme offered by the college is highly popular due to its promising career prospects. SRIET Coimbatore follows an industry-aligned curriculum to help students gain practical knowledge with deep digital insights. The college has also established multiple partnerships to regularly organise industry-driven training and certification programmes, internship opportunities, and industry visits for students.
Below mentioned are the popular Sri Ranganathar Institute of Engineering and Technology courses, along with fees and eligibility:

answer.text: Sri Ranganathar Institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityBE/ BTechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who has passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce an Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India Service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self-declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI, and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because we don't have Wi-Fi in hostel or Culturals other than Annual day..

content.Placements: In our College, we are the first batch pursuing Artificial Intelligence and Data Science. So, in our college, Computer Science engineers had been placed with the highest package of 9 LPA at Oneyes company and in various other companies. Other students were also placed with 4-5 Lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has 10 acres of land and also good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available only inside the college but not in the hostel. We have a central library, good classrooms, and also computer labs. But no cultural events are held at the college except the Annual Day function.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good facilities with average infrastructure and good placements.

content.Placements: Approximately, everyone got placements every year. The highest salary package offered is 33 LPA and the average salary package offered is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCl, TCS, Wipro, Bosch, Paragon, and also many companies owned by the management. Students are recruited for HRs and good jobs.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our college but some are not in proper condition. The quality of food served is good and the hostel is good. Sports are good. No emergency medical facilities are available. The hostel facility is good and good facilities are available in our college. The canteen is not so good. It is average enough for middle-class students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, faculty will be friendly, placements are good, and there are good labs.

content.Placements: For computer science and engineering courses, there are more than 200 students studying at my college. The average package for a computer science engineer is about INR 3–4 LPA, and the maximum we can get is INR 8–10 LPA. For full-stack development, Java and Python are what most companies expect. HCL and TCS are the top recruiting companies. In my college, everyone will get placement in any of the best companies.
content.Infrastructure: From 2024 on, the canteen is going to be very big! Constuction works have now only started. For hostelers in some areas, we will find difficulty with wifi. But in classrooms and labs, there will be 24-hour wifi service, and labs are really good. For a computer science course, there are more than four labs. They conduct sports days, and prizes will be given. Due to the engineering college, the sports will be less intense, so we should always be concerned with placements and studies.

admission_process.title: SRIET Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SRIET admission is entrance-based for B.E/BTech courses. The college offers one course at the UG level, i.e., B.E/BTech. Admission to the courses is open.Sri Ranganathar Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers an online mode of application. Candidates are required to apply online by visiting the college's official website to apply for admission. To know more about SRIET admission 2025, go through the following section:

SRIET admission is ongoing for BTech. The college offers counselling-based admission to all courses. The college offersB.E/BTechcourses at UG levels. Additionally, the college offersB.E/BTech Lateral entry. The duration of the courses is four years. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear forTNEA Counsellingaccepted by the college. Want to know more admission-related details aboutSRIET courseeligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Pass Class 10 and Class 12 with 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) inMathematics, Physics and Chemistry

SRIET admission process contains multiple steps, including registration, selection, and fee payment for final seat confirmation. Given below are the step-by-step details for Sri Ranganathar Institute of Engineering and Technology admission 2025:STEP 1: SRIET Application Process 2025Candidates are required to fill out the SRIET admission eligibility criteria and selection criteria for B.E./ BTech. After filling out the admission criteria, candidates are required to fill out the application form online by visiting the official website of the college.STEP 2: SRIET Selection RoundThe college offers admission to candidates for B.E./ BTech based on TNEA counselling. Additionally, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria for a particular course to be eligible for admission.STEP 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee SubmissionFor final seat allotment, the college releases the merit list on its official website. After candidates get selected based on their merits, candidates are required to pay aSRIET tuition feeto lock in their seats.

reviews.review_text: Serene and green campus. Wi-fi campus. Various laboratories for all department. Ventilated classrooms. Full equipped with furniture. Mammoth auditorium. Our library has more than 17000 volumes of book. The hostel quality is excellent. Hygienic food is provided to all the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty will be friendly, placements are good, and there are good labs.
reviews.review_text: From 2024 on, the canteen is going to be very big! Constuction works have now only started. For hostelers in some areas, we will find difficulty with wifi. But in classrooms and labs, there will be 24-hour wifi service, and labs are really good. For a computer science course, there are more than four labs. They conduct sports days, and prizes will be given. Due to the engineering college, the sports will be less intense, so we should always be concerned with placements and studies.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and matured handling teachers.
reviews.review_text: Library is peaceful and nice with immense pleasure. Food is good in the canteen with quality things. Sports and games are fantastic to gain knowledge. Wi-Fi is restricted. Classrooms are nice.

reviews.review_heading: My college good placement.
reviews.review_text:
1. all specialities are available 
2. All sports are playing cricket football volleyball, hand ball, basketball are some special games are playing with students women spots are available hostel food are very good mess are very neat and clean it very well.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good for studying B.Tech in Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: When we come to facilities and infrastructure, the college has the best infrastructure of labs with Wi-Fi, classes with the best quality projectors. Large auditorium for celebration festivals and some cultural. The hostel is also very nice, with good washrooms, nice water facilities, hot water for bathing, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this college is very good.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities for hostel students. Provides quality food, well-conditioned rooms, good weather with friends, good maintenance, and cleaning. Even though 24/7 dedication facilities are available in our college. Canteen is available, we also have sports, culturals, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: The worst college because of no placement support by the college and the worst faculty.

review_content.Placements: In my course, only 2 students get placed in HR and business development departments at a 12k per month job. The total number of students is 65. The highest package offered by the company in college is, till now, 4.5 LPA. There is no well-established company visit here. Not a single student gets an internship from college. The top roles offered by the companies are business development roles and sales roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty of the college are the worst; they come to the college for their own attendance, not for teaching students. There are separate buildings for each department. Food facilities in the hostel and canteen are poor. There are no medical facilities in the college. Sports facilities are also the worst. There is a ground for cricket, but it has never been cleaned to play.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: A better institute for engineers.

review_content.Placements: Thirty percent of students were placed. The lowest and highest salary packages fall between 5 to 15 lakhs per year. The average package is around 7.5 lakhs per year. I recommend this institute because many big civil engineering recruiting companies like JCB, L&T, are hiring students from GECBH.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the hostels of the college, you will get RO water for drinking, geysers in cold weather, and nice food quality. All students are living just like a family atmosphere. Hostel warden, Submit sir, is very nice and helpful in nature for all students. In hostels, privacy is the first priority.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The placement ratio is very low.

content.Placements: The highest package is 4 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is of very low quality, which is disappointing for other students and me. On the college campus, cleanliness is very poor, and other facilities, like hostel cleanliness, are also not satisfactory. According to all students, this is not the best college for the future.
content.Faculty: At this campus, some teachers are very supportive if you take an interest in the subject and try to clarify your doubts after the lecture. Some teachers give their 100% to solve your problems. The semester exam level is good. I do not know the exact passing percentage.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is decent. Mess food is as expected (average).

content.Placements: Placements are decent and getting better. There are limited companies that visit the campus for placements, but as the college is going to be transformed into an RIT (Rajasthan Institute of Technology), everything will get better. The coding environment is decent.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, especially the department buildings. Each department has its own lab, workshops, and classrooms. Wi-Fi facilities are also available. The library has all the useful books. If you are interested in sports, you can continue your interest. There is a basketball and volleyball ground.
