reviews.review_heading: Honest review about government engineering college Bharatpur.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is around 54 acres and the campus life is fabulous. You learn many life lessons from this campus. If we talk about hostel, it is good and the annual fee of the hostel is around INR 54,000 pet annum but food is not good. Our computer lab is full with many facilities like Wi-Fi and e-yantra lab.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Govt. Engineering College Bharatpur.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are very good compared to those at other government colleges. The mess food is very good. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and computer labs are well structured. All types of facilities are available to play cricket, football, volleyball, basketball, football, and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Govt. Engineering College Bharatpur.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there are 5 different sections of different branches and then an administration block and 2 hostels for boys and girls. There are a well-furnished library and labs. We have a football ground, volleyball ground, cricket ground, basketball court, and an indoor badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: I have 2 years of experience in this college, and until now, I am a bit satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs are well set up and are provided with good speed Wi-Fi. There are smart classrooms. The library is also available, but it is of less use. Classrooms are very big and can afford good accommodation of students at a time. The hostel is on our college campus for boys, and the girls' hostel is outside of the college under strict observation. Quality of food is average. There is no proper canteen, and medical facilities in our college are average. Sports and games are very popular in our...

reviews.review_heading: I suggest not to waste your time and money by getting admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in this college, and the whole campus is covered with Jio Wi-Fi. Each student has a separate user ID and password to login to their ID, and each student gets 1 GB data per day. There are all types of labs in this college, and some classrooms are smart.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is underdeveloped. The funds given by TEQIP programme has helped in the development of infrastructure. The library has quite a lot of books and labs are well-equipped with modern equipment. The food served is quite fine, and the canteen is under development. Sports and medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied of our faculty and good placement in 2019.
reviews.review_text: Best Wi-Fi facility, best lab facilities, good classrooms,  1.50 lakh Books Worth library,  good and experienced lecturer in our college. Technical seminar, technical event, workshops are organized every semester for students to create there skills.

reviews.review_heading: It provided good placements in 2018-19.
reviews.review_text: All the departments have separate labs, classrooms, common library and Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is good, and the quality of the food served is also good. Medical and sports facilities are also good. Hostel authority conducts games and sports for students to increase their interest.

reviews.review_heading: I'm so happy with all the facilities in our course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. All facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library for all departments were available. There are canteens with good quality food. Sports and games are available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I had a good experience in the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. I have attended a technical fest named Spark, and it was quite impressing. I also heard from our seniors that the upcoming event is the annual function and it will also be organised very well.

reviews.review_heading: Decent engineering college with supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for CSE are good, with Wi-Fi connectivity available across the entire campus, allowing students to access resources. It has well-equipped labs with necessary software and tools for projects and well-ventilated classrooms for lectures. There is a decent library that has a wide range of relevant books. Hostel facilities are average, with okay food in the mess and canteen serving. Basic medical facilities are available in the college for emergencies and minor...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Raghu Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Library is top-notch at the college. Wi-Fi connection is also provided to the students. Classrooms are well-equipped with proper working fans. Sports are conducted weekly once. Hostels are good. There are two canteens at the college with decent prices.

reviews.review_heading: Raghu's new journey in college life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our college are not bad, but the availability of the lab for this course is not good. There is no lab provided for experiential purposes for students. They have to bring their own laptops and do the experiential tasks on their laptops.

reviews.review_heading: A place for innovative ideas, extracurricular activities, and career growth.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-stocked libraries, modern classrooms, Wi-Fi-enabled labs, and LAN connections. Hostels are well-maintained with AC facilities, study rooms, a mess, and canteens for boys and girls. It also provides medical facilities, sports grounds, and an indoor stadium. Our college environment and surroundings are the most loved ones.

reviews.review_heading: Great for innovation and supportive of entrepreneurship.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers Wi-Fi-enabled labs, LAN connections, spacious classrooms, a central library, and branch-specific libraries. Hostels are well-maintained with AC facilities, study rooms, separate mess and canteen areas. The campus includes medical facilities, sports grounds, and an indoor game area. Additionally, our college has an Entrepreneurship Cell that supports innovation and encourages extracurricular activities through NCC, NSS, and various student clubs.

reviews.review_heading: Good for placements and training sessions. New opportunities for innovation.
reviews.review_text: Our college has labs with full LAN connections and Wi-Fi. We have a library which has a maximum availability of books for all branches. There is a main library and branch-wise libraries. There are well-maintained hostels with air conditioners. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. Various events are organized by NCC and NSS in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty with support for each student to build their career.
reviews.review_text: We have peaceful and excellent infrastructure, like labs that provide sufficient equipment for each and every student. The classrooms are clean with the best ventilation and sufficient benches. Mess and canteen facilities are good, and there is a sports club where both girls and boys can play and show their abilities in different extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Never liked the college since the day I joined.
reviews.review_text: I am not a hostler, but many of my friends have suggested to me that the hostel food is very bad and unhygienic. Wi-Fi is provided only during class hours, and the library has only old books. The canteen also doesn't provide many food options, and the food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: Not very satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All labs have good Wi-Fi and sufficient computers. The library is well-stocked with books from all sectors. Hostel facilities are decent, and the food is average. There are many sports and games available, including cricket and basketball, with competitions held annually.

reviews.review_heading: An icebreaking experience of life.
reviews.review_text: College Infrastructure is good, but now it is being changed, so I don't know how comfortable the newcomers might feel. It is quite cool, homely, and comfortable back then. I don't have much knowledge about the hostel, but from what I know from my friends, it has too many restrictions.

reviews_list.review_title: Not recommended to do B.Tech from this college, it does not feel like college, it feels like school.

review_content.Placements: In the placement rate, our college is very low, mostly students are trying to get off campus placement because only a few small companies visit. Our college offers around 3 to 4 LPA as the highest package, but recently, from this year, our college has been trying to do its best in the placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is not so big, its average. Campus is not so big. Most labs are there, but the quality is not good, its average in terms of equipment present, and a few classrooms have been equipped with digital boards recently, but most classrooms have old whiteboards. A library and Wi-Fi facility are available. In our campus, only 2 boys and 1 girls hostels are present, that is not enough for all students. Many students did not get a hostel. All the hostels have Wi-Fi facilities, but the mess and canteen are average. The sports ground is not big and only a few outdoor and indoor games are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Explaining my review about my experience at my college.

review_content.Placements: A few days back, 5 students got placed in a company with 3 LPA. Those were my seniors from the 21 batch. I too will study hard for better placement. Right now, I am in 1st year civil branch. Doing quite well, better than my expectations. Moreover, I will try my best.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is properly maintained, and studies are going well. Although sports are also being done, I participated in sports and got 2 awards. I have participated in volleyball, kabaddi, badminton, and shot put. I got prizes in volleyball and kabaddi.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely good because of the faculty, good placement, and the principal is very strict.

review_content.Placements: Few students are placed on campus , some placed off campus also. Highest Package is 10 LPA Lowest Package is 1.8 LPA Average Package is 2 LPA Mostly recruiters are from Tata Consultancy and others Some students got internships. Coordinators’ roles are most offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Labs are equipped with the latest version of desktops and are fully air-conditioned. Classrooms are also good. The library is good and has every book related to any course. It is open till 12 at night and is also fully air-conditioned. Hostel food is very good and feels like home food . The canteen is also very well . Games often happen on campus. In case of medical requirements, nearly all doctors are available.

content.Infrastructure: Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Engineering, Electronics Engineering, and Electrical Engineering each have their own departments. content.Faculty: All professors are PhD holders and highly educated. Appreciated for the specific skills and projects. All HODs are helping the specific branches. College examination is very strict and hard. All teachers are cooperative and help with any doubts and problems. All professors organise the specific classes and complete the entire syllabus on time, helping the students to prepare for specific examinations, such as GATE, SSC JE, PSU, Government Jobs, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfied with my college. Life is so beautiful on our campus.

content.Placements: Placement of my college is very good among all government engineering colleges of Bihar I think it is best choice for kosi students. Last year the highest package is 8 lac. For mechanical engineering student. Each and every year all mechanical engineering students are placed.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very good. And it is well maintained. Our college administration is doing very good work. Among all government engineering colleges the hostel of our college is very good and well maintained.24/7 Wi-Fi facility is available in our college hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Not recommended to do B.Tech from this college, it does not feel like college, it feels like school.

content.Placements: In the placement rate, our college is very low, mostly students are trying to get off campus placement because only a few small companies visit. Our college offers around 3 to 4 LPA as the highest package, but recently, from this year, our college has been trying to do its best in the placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is not so big, its average. Campus is not so big. Most labs are there, but the quality is not good, its average in terms of equipment present, and a few classrooms have been equipped with digital boards recently, but most classrooms have old whiteboards. A library and Wi-Fi facility are available. In our campus, only 2 boys and 1 girls hostels are present, that is not enough for all students. Many students did not get a hostel. All the hostels have Wi-Fi facilities, but the mess and canteen are average. The sports ground is not big and only a few outdoor and indoor games are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Explaining my review about my experience at my college.

content.Placements: A few days back, 5 students got placed in a company with 3 LPA. Those were my seniors from the 21 batch. I too will study hard for better placement. Right now, I am in 1st year civil branch. Doing quite well, better than my expectations. Moreover, I will try my best.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is properly maintained, and studies are going well. Although sports are also being done, I participated in sports and got 2 awards. I have participated in volleyball, kabaddi, badminton, and shot put. I got prizes in volleyball and kabaddi.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good because of the faculty, good placement, and the principal is very strict.

content.Placements: Few students are placed on campus , some placed off campus also. Highest Package is 10 LPA Lowest Package is 1.8 LPA Average Package is 2 LPA Mostly recruiters are from Tata Consultancy and others Some students got internships. Coordinators’ roles are most offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Labs are equipped with the latest version of desktops and are fully air-conditioned. Classrooms are also good. The library is good and has every book related to any course. It is open till 12 at night and is also fully air-conditioned. Hostel food is very good and feels like home food . The canteen is also very well . Games often happen on campus. In case of medical requirements, nearly all doctors are available.

On the other hand, at the PG level, the LMCST: Lourdes Matha College of Science and Technology offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of the worst college management which does not support sports and programs.

content.Placements: Up to 60%-70% of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 30000, the lowest package is 8000 and the average package is 12000 to 18000. Top recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, Amazon, and Sutherland. Our college doesn't provide any internships. Students have to do internships on their own. The roles offered depend on the companies and the CGPA obtained by the students.
content.Infrastructure: There is an average infrastructure for the department and classes. Computer labs are provided with Wi-Fi, and other labs are provided with average facilities. A vast variety of theory books are available in the library but the space and tables to sit and read are limited. The facility and infrastructure of the library are not bad. There are rooms as well as a dormitory in the hostel. In each room, 3 students are occupied and in the dormitory, 18 students. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is below average. There are no medical facilities. There is time for games every evening but not for sports.

Highest Package : Rs. 1 crore at Goldman Sachs for Btech students. MCA: The highest package was Rs. 10 LPA. Average Package : Rs. 3.6 LPA for MCA students. Profiles Offered: Technical, Sales and Marketing, etc. Plans After Degree : Seeking a job and currently employed in a good position with a decent package.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is available for ladies and men. Food menus change on a daily basis, and both vegetarians and nonvegetarians enjoy them. Also, a college canteen is available. The registration process is to contact the hostel wardens and pay 6 months in advance. Outside the college, there are rooms available for rent.

faqs.question: How can I get into LMCST: Lourdes Matha College of Science and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
LMCST: Lourdes Matha College of Science and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed a Bachelor's degree with the required. 
Final year appearing students can also apply on provisional basis.MCACandidate must have passed any recognised Bachelor's Degree of minimum 3 years duration in any discipline with Mathematics at 10 + 2 level or 
passed in any recognised Bachelor's Degree of minimum 3 years duration in any discipline with Mathematics/Statistics as one of the subjects.M.E./M.TechCandidates, who have passed AMIE/AMIETE Examinations with valid GATE score and a minimum of 55% marks for section B in AMIE/AMIETE examination.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 17 years of age as on the 31st December 2023.

hostel_campus.college_name: LMCST: Lourdes Matha College of Science and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the worst college management which does not support sports and programs.
reviews.review_text: There is an average infrastructure for the department and classes. Computer labs are provided with Wi-Fi, and other labs are provided with average facilities. A vast variety of theory books are available in the library but the space and tables to sit and read are limited. The facility and infrastructure of the library are not bad. There are rooms as well as a dormitory in the hostel. In each room, 3 students are occupied and in the dormitory, 18 students. The quality of food available in the mes...

reviews.review_heading: Gives placement opportunities to every students.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is available for ladies and men. Food menus change on a daily basis, and both vegetarians and nonvegetarians enjoy them. Also, a college canteen is available. The registration process is to contact the hostel wardens and pay 6 months in advance. Outside the college, there are rooms available for rent.

reviews.review_heading: Good opportunities in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many infrastructure facilities. It provides efficient lab facilities for the easy understanding of the course. The classrooms are well-ventilated and kept neatly. The library offers various books for studies, as well as literature books. The quality of food in the canteen is excellent; it's very healthy and tasty. The college provides various opportunities to perform in sports as well as in games.

reviews.review_heading: All About my college, it is a green campus and nice atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members showcase vast experience and expertise, successfully conducting theoretical and practical sessions. The spacious classrooms comfortably accommodate students, and the department is equipped with its own library in addition to access to the central library.

reviews.review_heading: Green campus with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are quite spacious and have good facilities. All types of labs, such as concrete, hydrology, mechanical labs, etc., are there. The campus also provides good Wi-Fi facilities. Additionally, the campus has a library with all the required books for research and projects. Overall, the campus is well-maintained, tidy, and clean.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many national and international journals and E-books. The central library is a member of NDL, which has a collection of more than 6 lakhs E-books. The food served in the cafeteria is good and provides vegetarian and non-vegetarian food. Our cafeteria is good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied. College life is good. Good placements.
reviews.review_text: College offers really good Classrooms, Computer Labs, Other Labs, Library. There is a wide range of books in the library. Computer Labs are Decent. But the Hostel rooms are not that good. I would rate 65/100 for hostel. Hostel food is not that good. Hostel rooms are also not that good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements, friendly campus, and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our library has a good collection of books. The hostel is good. Sports and games are held occasionally. We have a physical education period every week. Mobile phones are not allowed on campus, so there are no Wi-Fi facilities available for students. The mess food is pretty good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides a feeling of home away from home to students. Keeping in view the same philosophy, they provide a secure, comfortable, and healthy environment for all the residents. The hostel premises have a common TV room and state-of-the-art indoor and outdoor sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A college with excellent infrastructure and good value for money.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was impeccable. The campus is nature friendly with abundant trees in between the buildings. The college library is Wi-Fi-enabled and student-friendly. Apart from the books related to the course, it also contains general knowledge books and newspapers. The canteen provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good campus with good atmosphere, and it has very good faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Very good quality food is available. The hostel is good. Its surroundings have a calm atmosphere for studying. A good mess is available that provides good food. The hostel provides international standard facilities. The course is also a better opportunity for attaining a job quickly.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied. Absolutely satisfied of all the facilities here and the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Green campus, and has a good Atmosphere for studying, the infrastructure is also well maintained, Each department has their own building separate from one another apart some distance. Wi-Fi is not available, classrooms are big and well maintained. Provides a library with a large collection of study material and other books. Hostel facilities are also maintained very good, neat and food is also good. Food is prepared according to the list of hostelers. College has a good canteen, refreshment area...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college performance is better. The college can also include other engineering fields.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in our college are attractive. Labs in our college are well-facilitated with the new technology of experiments. The instruments are well-maintained. In the hostel, the food served is good and clean. It also encourages sports, arts, and games.

reviews.review_heading: A college with all the required facilities.
reviews.review_text: It has excellent infrastructure and facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, hostel and transport facilities. The food in the canteen was very hygienic and delicious. It gives more support to sports and games. Competitions like inter-college tournaments, etc., are conducted to make students give more interest in the sports field.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good with a wonderful atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for MBA programme are extremely good. Facilities for the MBA department are upgraded and made better by making changes in classrooms, faculty room, conference room, etc., to uplift standards. Hostel facility, canteen facility and bus services are available on the campus.

The CAT 2026 registration is expected to start in the Aug, 2026 for admission to the MBA course.

top_recruiters: CGI Information Systems and Management Consultants

fees_and_eligibility.overview: TITE - Templecity Institute of Technology and Engineering offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the TITE - Templecity Institute of Technology and Engineering offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for TITE - Templecity Institute of Technology and Engineering courses range between INR 79,500 to 2,76,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: They all have a good behavior.

review_content.Placements: 70% of the students were placed in our college. Maximum INR 3 to 4 LPA package is offered in our college. Good companies come to our college. Companies choose good students with good percentage of marks.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel and college are good. All the facilities are available in our college. Food quality is good. The college has facilities in medical and sports, etc. Hostel also has good water supply and drinking water. It makes a good place to study. Wi-Fi, library and labs are also available.
review_content.Faculty: Exams are also good and faculty behavior is good. Semester exams are required to be passed with a good percentage. Students become ready for the industry.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A college has no facilities in 2022.

review_content.Placements: 50 percent of students were placed in our college. I think it is up to the students to get placements. The average package is 1-3 Lacs. In my course, the top roles are separated by management that is of manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities we have now is a fan and two tube lights in one room. There is one Wi-Fi with the lowest speed for 3 rooms. Food quality is quite good in the canteen and there is no mess or cafe in the campus right now. Cafe is closed since last 2-3 years.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are quite knowledgeable and teaching quality is not satisfactory for students. When we asked hard questions to them, they are not able to answer without mobile. The course curriculum is not relevant. It makes few students industry ready. Semester exams are very difficult because of the teaching.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty. Good placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in this course, for example, 24-hour Wi-Fi facilities library facilities and lab facilities. In this college, hostel facilities are available, a 24-hour caring warden is available and sports and medical facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is best college in Odisha state.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are very good. All classroom are added central AC and Wi-Fi available in whole campus. Our college surrounding us natural beauty and mountains and trees. Our hostel facility are very good 24 hours water and current supply. Our canteen food are very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: They all have a good behavior.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and college are good. All the facilities are available in our college. Food quality is good. The college has facilities in medical and sports, etc. Hostel also has good water supply and drinking water. It makes a good place to study. Wi-Fi, library and labs are also available.

reviews.review_heading: A college has no facilities in 2022.
reviews.review_text: The facilities we have now is a fan and two tube lights in one room. There is one Wi-Fi with the lowest speed for 3 rooms. Food quality is quite good in the canteen and there is no mess or cafe in the campus right now. Cafe is closed since last 2-3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus surroundings are good, and the communication is also better.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are very good. Our college is located in a peaceful area. The digital computer laboratory and classrooms are well-maintained. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled 24X7. The library is also digital. The food served in the canteen is good. Our college provides water and light 24X7. Medical facilities are available on campus. It also has a big playground.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with quality of education, campus arrangements, placements, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department environment is good but no Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms are fine and the library facility is also good. All equipment is available in the lab but 2 or 3 test practicals are executed. Hostel is good. They provide food 4 times a day. Wi-Fi is not there. Rooms condition is good, No problem with electricity and water.

reviews.review_heading: Good organisation for study.
reviews.review_text: Well planned infrastructure with a green environment, all the classes have air condition there is one library in which more than two thousand books are available, one playground is also here, all the classes have good quality, food quality is moderate.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members, need to improve for the placement.
reviews.review_text: Very good Wi-Fi, Labs, Classrooms. The library was good. Library was very spacious and so many technical stuff were available to read. But there were no such proper medical facilities for the students. Hostel rooms were quite good to accommodate 4 students at a time. Care taker was also very much helpful.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good engineering college.
reviews.review_text: TITE has an average infrastructure which should be improved. There are no medical facilities for students. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college has a huge library for the students and professors as well. The college has a huge indoor stadium.

reviews.review_heading: Some of the good faculty members were retired from our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It is under the hill of Lord Brunei. It is situated in a good location. So, it has good transportation facilities. The classrooms are spacious, and they have a capacity of 70 students to sit at a time. The classrooms are well-furnished and well-ventilated. The library is modern, and it has all the required books.

reviews.review_heading: Good college management, but should improve its placement cell and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The best thing about this college is its infrastructure and location. The computer lab has sufficient computers available for each batch. Lots of instruments and machines are available in the workshop. The library has a huge collection of textbooks and soft copies of the books are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure and Environment but money minded trustees and over interference failed to work.
reviews.review_text: College has good modern infrastructure like wi-fi campus, well-equipped labs, library having sufficient books. There is to canteens one for hostel and another for day scholars. Food quality is good. Hostel rooms are well furnished with tiles each having 4beds. Sports facilities available for cricket, volly etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied for campus. But in our civil there were Wellman faculty who always support us.
reviews.review_text: The outer look is very good. The study environment is also too good. The classroom, lab, library is well mentioned. Wifi, Gym, medical facilities also there. And one emergency van is there for any emergency hospital case. I was staying in hostel and hostel environment is neat and clean. They have two canteen one for hostel lite and one for faculty and outer student. The food of canteen was very good and also they listen the students complain about the food and also take action. We decide our men...

reviews.review_heading: You can find a good environment for study, and the hostel facilities are good for boys and girls.
reviews.review_text: You can find the titanic atmosphere there. The classrooms are spacious and digital. If you are choosing the hostel, then it's good for you because you don't have to come from Bhubaneswar, so it's good for the library and reading room. The canteen food is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college at Bhubaneswar, Odisha.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good as that of other engineering colleges in Odisha. There is Wi-Fi service 24*7 with high-speed. The library is present with all the types of books. There is good discipline. The support teams regularly play and practice the games. Teams are divided in the intercollege matches. We are getting good results.

admission_overview.college_name: Kuppam Engineering College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: Kuppam Engineering College Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Kuppam Engineering College admission is entrance-based. Kuppam Engineering College offers several programmes at undergraduate and postgraduate levels in the fields of Engineering and Management. To get a seat in any of the offered courses, students are required to satisfy the admission criteria of the desired course. The college accepts several national and state-level entrance tests, such as AP EAMCET/ BIEAP/ AP POLYCET.

eligibility_selection.title: Kuppam Engineering College Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Kuppam Engineering College course admission is made on the basis of preset admission criteria. Students looking to join the UG courses need to pass Class 12 or equivalent, whereas PG admissions require students to complete graduation from a recognised university. In addition to clearing the basic eligibility, students must also provide valid entrance exam scores. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for popular Kuppam Engineering College courses:

admission_process.title: Kuppam Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission process for Kuppam Engineering College includes several steps from application to selection, followed by admission confirmation. Students can apply online for the desired programme by registering. Before applying, students must make sure that they fulfil the admission criteria as specified by the college. Eligible students can follow the steps explained below to complete theKuppam Engineering College admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested students can apply online by visiting the official website of the college and filling out the application form. Students need to provide the required information and documents to complete the process.
Step 2: Selection Process

Students are mainly selected based on entrance exam scores. For admission to the BTech programme, the college accepts AP EAMCET. Admission to the MBA and MTech programme needs candidates to have AP ICET and GATE or AP PGECET, respectively.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected students need to pay theKuppam Engineering College admission feesof the college to secure their seats.

Admission is available through graduation with 50% marks and an AP ICET valid score. The programme offers specialisations such as Finance, Marketing, and HR with placement assistance.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at Kuppam Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Kuppam Engineering College demands that the candidates possess a bachelor's degree with minimum 50% marks for MBA admission. Reserved category students can also apply with 45% marks. Moreover, passing Andhra Pradesh ICET is also mandatory for selection.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for MBA admission at Kuppam Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Kuppam Engineering College only accepts Andhra Pradesh ICET marks for MBA admission. Applicants are required to apply in Andhra Pradesh ICET counselling organized by the state authorities. Admission is done on a basis of exam rank and seat availability.

reviews.review_heading: There are no good placements.
reviews.review_text: There are many problems in the hostel campus, like the worst water facility, food delay, no perfect campus infrastructure, water problems for bathing, etc. Facilities and infrastructure available for our course and department are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for rural students.
reviews.review_text: Kuppam Engineering College offers good classrooms, Wi-Fi, labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are basic but clean, with average mess food. Medical help and sports facilities like cricket, volleyball, and badminton are available. Good college.

reviews.review_heading: My college and my experience in it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and bookshop. Facilities in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machines, CCTV, food, and TV. Food in canteen is nice with reasonable price and quality. Medical facilities are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My college and my experience in it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and bookshop. Facilities in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machines, CCTV, food, and a TV. Food in canteen is nice with reasonable prices and quality. Medical facilities are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My college and my experience in it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and bookshop. Facilities in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machines, CCTV, food, and a TV. Food in canteen is nice with reasonable prices and quality. Medical facilities are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My college and my experience in it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and bookshop. Facilities in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machines, CCTV, food, and a TV. Food in canteen is nice with reasonable prices and quality. Medical facilities are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My memories of my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and bookshop. The facilities in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machines, CCTV, food, and TV. The food in the canteen is nice, with reasonable prices and quality. The medical facilities are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is good when compared to 2015, now it is better. Placements also better little bit increased.
reviews.review_text: In our department, the Wi-Fi was directly connected to computer systems. The lab infrastructure was above average, not 100% was not good. Our college library was 100% good. In library, all books available belong to any year first year to final year.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to study in chittoor district
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good in manner. The college is having all paborito ratire with fully furnished equipment and hostel is very clean and it is maintained very hygienically.  The beds and washrooms are very good in the hostel. It is very peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: Not happy with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay for the money that we are paying. I like the college library because many books are available and the digital library is also there. Labs and classrooms are good. We have many labs that use Siemens and apps. At our college, we have a research and development cell.

reviews.review_heading: Okay for the money that we are paying.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay in the labs equipment is damaged and old components are not working. In the classrooms projectors and fans are there are not working. In the computer, all the computers are very old and half of the computers don't work. Gym is there but we have to pay the money separately.

reviews.review_heading: College with average facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Excellent Wi-Fi, good lab facility, classrooms are just average, and the library is good. 
The food in the hostel is just awesome, the washrooms are the worst, and geysers are available for hot water.
Wardens are the worst. They didn't even allow you to cut cake in hostel rooms on your birthday, either.

reviews.review_heading: Happy with the hostel food.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food provided in the mess, as well as the security of the hostels, especially for the girls' hostels, is commendable. Within the campus, we have access to an ATM, a medical store, a hospital, and even a movie theater, rendering everything available within the premises; there's no need to go elsewhere. We also have access to advanced labs within the college.

reviews.review_heading: Sports are very good at this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good; the college campus is built on 50 acres. We have a cricket ground, football court, volleyball court, an indoor stadium, and more. Our college conducts games, and we enjoy playing; we have coaches for the games. The gym is also available free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the 10 acres of land is excellent. We have advanced labs, and they are air-conditioned. We offer free, unlimited high-speed 24X7 Wi-Fi in both the college and the hostel. Within the college premises, all stationary shops, hotels, medical facilities, and a hospital are available.

review_content.There are different facilities available: a three-sharing room or a two-sharing room. Food is good. They serve different foods on different days. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. CSE in Data Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college has very good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: There are not many good placements at this college. Last year, the maximum package for the B.Tech. was INR 13,000 per month. But this year, there are four top recruiting companies. And many students were selected for these companies. And now, in some days, there is an Australian company coming only for mechanical students that offers a salary of INR 30,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is so good. There are three buildings for three different courses. In all of them, there is a library. Which is good for students. This college has a fully Wi-Fi campus. Wi-Fi is also available 24 hours a day, seven days a week in the hostel. The food in the mess is also good. But the food in the canteen is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Value for money, if you take admission in B.Tech .

review_content.Placements: There are no placements, only internship companies came for paid and free. But mostly they do not provide money for internship. There are only 12 students in my batch of 2019-2023. If we talk about placement, some non IT company come to college which only offers sales.
review_content.Infrastructure: If we talk about hostel infrastructure, that is so good and is well structured and food which we get in hostel is better than other colleges. In a week you will get non veg twice and for veg paneer is made. There is Wi-Fi and canteen facility which are the best. Gym is also there which is also good .

review_summary.college_name: Maya Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Maya Group of Colleges offers quality education, modern facilities, and experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: Students should score 60-70% above in academics to become eligible for placements. The lowest package is 2 LPA and the average package offered ranges from 5-6 LPA. The university successfully conducts placement drives with companies like Amazon, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. The cafeteria is available and hostels are good. The campus is also good. Both girl's and boys' hostels are available with an average fee of 1.3 lakhs. The hostel is equipped with 24x7 hour electricity and water supply.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Advance Institute of Science and Technology.

content.Placements: There are 60 students in my class. The highest package is 25 lakhs, the lowest is 4 lakhs, and the average package is 10 lakhs. Companies like Amazon, Tata, ECL, HDFC, etc. come for a placement drive at our college. Like, almost every student gets internships. Different companies offer different roles, like HR, manager, marketing head, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are different facilities available in our department, including Wi-Fi, smart classes, labs with different equipment, a big central library in each department, seminar halls, etc. Hostel rooms are big. They offer two kinds of rooms: a three-sharing room or a two-sharing room. Food is good. They serve different foods on different days. The menu is fixed, and it contains different cuisines. Medical facilities are available. Different sports and games like football, cricket, hockey, basketball, badminton, chess, carrom, etc. are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. CSE in Data Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college has very good infrastructure.

content.Placements: There are not many good placements at this college. Last year, the maximum package for the B.Tech. was INR 13,000 per month. But this year, there are four top recruiting companies. And many students were selected for these companies. And now, in some days, there is an Australian company coming only for mechanical students that offers a salary of INR 30,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is so good. There are three buildings for three different courses. In all of them, there is a library. Which is good for students. This college has a fully Wi-Fi campus. Wi-Fi is also available 24 hours a day, seven days a week in the hostel. The food in the mess is also good. But the food in the canteen is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Value for money, if you take admission in B.Tech .

content.Placements: There are no placements, only internship companies came for paid and free. But mostly they do not provide money for internship. There are only 12 students in my batch of 2019-2023. If we talk about placement, some non IT company come to college which only offers sales.
content.Infrastructure: If we talk about hostel infrastructure, that is so good and is well structured and food which we get in hostel is better than other colleges. In a week you will get non veg twice and for veg paneer is made. There is Wi-Fi and canteen facility which are the best. Gym is also there which is also good .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. CSE in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has excellent facilities.

content.Placements: It is one of the best colleges in Dehradun. I recommend all students get admitted to this college. Top recruiting companies visited our campus. Almost 30 students out of 100 were placed.
content.Infrastructure: Student life at this college was excellent because all facilities were available. They provided Wi-Fi, comfortable beds, and delicious food. There were two different houses, one for boys and another for girls. There was laundry available.
content.Faculty: All teachers at this college were extremely helpful in every way. They were highly qualified and extremely knowledgeable. The semester exams were very difficult. The college conducted semester exams very strictly. The pass percentage was 33%.

admission_process.title: Maya Group of Colleges Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Maya Group of Colleges admissions 2025 are open for various courses at the UG and PG level. Maya Group of Colleges admits students based on various national-level entrance exam and as per last educational qualification. The mode of application is online. The admission for all courses is based on merit and state/central university counselling.

The college offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma courses in the streams of Engineering, Management, Beauty & Fitness, and Science.Maya Group of Colleges courseadmissions 2025 will be based on various national-level entrance exam scores as per course requirements. Popular courses offered by the colleges are BPharma, BEd, BHM, BSc, BTech. Read on to know more aboutMaya Group of Collegescourse admissions 2025.

The college offers more than 11 courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more on Maya Group of Colleges admission 2025 from the table presented below:

reviews.review_heading: Maya Group of Colleges offers quality education, modern facilities, and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The cafeteria is available and hostels are good. The campus is also good. Both girl's and boys' hostels are available with an average fee of 1.3 lakhs. The hostel is equipped with 24x7 hour electricity and water supply.

reviews.review_heading: Advance Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: There are different facilities available in our department, including Wi-Fi, smart classes, labs with different equipment, a big central library in each department, seminar halls, etc. Hostel rooms are big. They offer two kinds of rooms: a three-sharing room or a two-sharing room. Food is good. They serve different foods on different days. The menu is fixed, and it contains different cuisines. Medical facilities are available. Different sports and games like football, cricket, hockey, basketball...

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is so good. There are three buildings for three different courses. In all of them, there is a library. Which is good for students. This college has a fully Wi-Fi campus. Wi-Fi is also available 24 hours a day, seven days a week in the hostel. The food in the mess is also good. But the food in the canteen is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, if you take admission in B.Tech .
reviews.review_text: If we talk about hostel infrastructure, that is so good and is well structured and food which we get in hostel is better than other colleges. In a week you will get non veg twice  and for veg paneer is made. There is Wi-Fi and canteen facility which are the best. Gym is also there which is also good .

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent facilities.
reviews.review_text: Student life at this college was excellent because all facilities were available. They provided Wi-Fi, comfortable beds, and delicious food. There were two different houses, one for boys and another for girls. There was laundry available.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend you to take admission in our college as it is good, but it is not that great.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is great, and it is very big in the area. It has fans in every class. Our hostel is also good for living and other things, and we have extracurricular activities. Our college promotes sports too.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is full of diversity and I would recommend joining here.
reviews.review_text: Course and infrastructure are good in our college. The infrastructure is neat and it has a very good environment for students. Maya Group of Colleges has many courses which might take your interest like, BHM, BBA, MBA, B.Tech, B.Pharma M.Pharma D.Pharma, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for overall development in academics, sports and all activities.
reviews.review_text: I am quite sure that our college has one of the best infrastructures in Uttarakhand. All departments are neat and tidy. The campus has a natural environment. Overall, the quality is very good, and it is the best college to enhance our desired skills.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides one of the best infrastructure and facilities in and around Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides well-equipped classrooms. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The best thing about our college is it owns four well-known hotels in Dehradun and Mussorie, which helps the students to get the best training during their course duration. Our college provides 24-hour power backup facility. Rooms in our hostel are well ventilated. Quality of food served in the mess is of very good. Good medical facilities are available to the students. Our college provides a wide range of sports l...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is amazing as the classrooms are properly equipped with smart class devices and have been constructed so that the visibility is always clear. Classrooms are spacious. The hostel is good with two and three sharing rooms and attached washrooms, so it gives a homely feeling. Food is quite good, and since the college is running B.Sc in agriculture, so the vegetables and other things are organically produced and used in college mess. Food quality is extremely good, and the ...

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and facilities, and I am satisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. We have a library which has thousands of books to learn. Our college has great furniture, and washrooms are also well-built and taken care of. The hostel is also good, but it is very difficult for south students to adjust to the food.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college as per my knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Good hostel and classrooms, featured labs, good food but you have to compromise if you are coming from any place other than north India as the food is favourable for North Indians. Coming to the facilities in hostel we have Wi-Fi, indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The agriculture land and nursery are available for practical works. The Classroom, library and laboratory are wellnequipped. The food in our mess is average. The Wi-Fi facility is available but very slow internet. The sports events are conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Agriculture land and nursery are available for practical works. The speed of the Wi-Fi facility in our hostel is very slow. The food served in our mess is very bad, but the medical facility is good. Sports events are conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: One of the best infrastructure compared to the other agriculture colleges in Dehradun. The agriculture land and nursery are available for practical works. The practical work are done frequently. The classroom, library and laboratory are well-equipped. Medical facilities are available. Mess food in our hostel is average. The sports events are conducted regularly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am very thankful to God that I have been placed from this college.

review_content.Placements: My Name is Harsh and my course is B.E. in Information Technology. 80% of students were placed in my college. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest is 2-3 LPA, and the average is 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies of my course are Google, Microsoft, Meta, Reliance, etc. 60–70% of student got internship from my course. Top roles offered in my course are Software developer, Web developer, Data analyst, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college provides better facilities of Wi-Fi, a hostel, and labs. The quality of food available in my college mess is very good for health. All computers work with high speed and high performance in our labs, and the Wi-Fi of our college works at high speed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My college life at LIT, Sarigam.

review_content.Placements: Almost 65% students were recruited from the campus this year, 2024. The highest package was around 7 lpa and the lowest package was around 1.5 lpa. 1rivet, TCS, Cognizant, Infosys, etc. are the top recruiters. SDE, associate officer, QA analyst, etc. are the top roles offered. The placement experience was very bad from the college side.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi, labs with Ethernet, classrooms with projectors, and a small library for the relevant references according to the subject of the course are available. The quality of hostel life was average; the canteen was below average, but the food was of good quality. Games included swimming, basketball, volleyball, football, cricket, badminton, chess, carrom, table tennis, etc.

individual_reviews.title: The best college from the bottom.

content.Placements: One percent of students were placed in my course. The average package of 4 LPA is offered in my course. TCS, Kataria showroom, Dayars recruit. No other companies at our college, only local companies come to college. 10 percent of students got internships that were also in Dayars.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi, water facility not provided properly, water coolers are just way too nasty. Washing machines are very few in number, and other conditions are also very poor. Half of the time, they do not work properly. They are in repair most of the time, and the food quality is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Just pure waste of money.

content.Placements: There were only 2 students placed out of 200. One student got 3 LPA and the other one got 2.5 LPA. TCS and TechnoHacks were the only companies that came for the placements. The 2 students placed were from my course IT. The roles offered are developer, project manager, and Software Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: College has great infrastructure, but the environment is not so good, not even pc are working, they are all low-end, and the Wi-Fi facility is not so good. Most of the time, there are wild animals moving on the campus all around. The food is also not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am very thankful to God that I have been placed from this college.

content.Placements: My Name is Harsh and my course is B.E. in Information Technology. 80% of students were placed in my college. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest is 2-3 LPA, and the average is 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies of my course are Google, Microsoft, Meta, Reliance, etc. 60–70% of student got internship from my course. Top roles offered in my course are Software developer, Web developer, Data analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: My college provides better facilities of Wi-Fi, a hostel, and labs. The quality of food available in my college mess is very good for health. All computers work with high speed and high performance in our labs, and the Wi-Fi of our college works at high speed.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My college life at LIT, Sarigam.

content.Placements: Almost 65% students were recruited from the campus this year, 2024. The highest package was around 7 lpa and the lowest package was around 1.5 lpa. 1rivet, TCS, Cognizant, Infosys, etc. are the top recruiters. SDE, associate officer, QA analyst, etc. are the top roles offered. The placement experience was very bad from the college side.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi, labs with Ethernet, classrooms with projectors, and a small library for the relevant references according to the subject of the course are available. The quality of hostel life was average; the canteen was below average, but the food was of good quality. Games included swimming, basketball, volleyball, football, cricket, badminton, chess, carrom, table tennis, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good teachers and provides good placements. It has a very good environment.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered for our course is 6 LPA. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. TCS is the most visited company on our campus. Many students got placed in our college. Top role offered is a game developer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all the required facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of the food is good and fresh. The mess and canteen are clean and hygienic. Medical facilities are available 24X7 in our college. Our college has a sports room for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: The best college from the bottom.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, water facility not provided properly, water coolers are just way too nasty. Washing machines are very few in number, and other conditions are also very poor. Half of the time, they do not work properly. They are in repair most of the time, and the food quality is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Just pure waste of money.
reviews.review_text: College has great infrastructure, but the environment is not so good, not even pc are working, they are all low-end, and the Wi-Fi facility is not so good. Most of the time, there are wild animals moving on the campus all around. The food is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: I am very thankful to God that I have been placed from this college.
reviews.review_text: My college provides better facilities of Wi-Fi, a hostel, and labs. The quality of food available in my college mess is very good for health. All computers work with high speed and high performance in our labs, and the Wi-Fi of our college works at high speed.

reviews.review_heading: My college life at LIT, Sarigam.
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi, labs with Ethernet, classrooms with projectors, and a small library for the relevant references according to the subject of the course are available. The quality of hostel life was average; the canteen was below average, but the food was of good quality. Games included swimming, basketball, volleyball, football, cricket, badminton, chess, carrom, table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers and provides good placements. It has a very good environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the required facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of the food is good and fresh. The mess and canteen are clean and hygienic. Medical facilities are available 24X7 in our college. Our college has a sports room for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure & facilities but the placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of course are well maintained. Labs have the proper equipment for practical & Computer lab has also all working computers. The campus has one library in which all course books are available. The hostel facilities of this college are not so good because local students study in this college so no one prefers the hostel. One canteen is available on the campus. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend this college for students who only want a degree.
reviews.review_text: The college is huge and very beautiful. It has a huge playground. The library and lab are very good. Classrooms are just average. Wi-Fi facility is not available, but we can use the internet in computer labs. The hostel is good, and the quality of food served is excellent. Medical facilities are also good here.

reviews.review_heading: This college is for those who want to study, enjoy, and invest their time in campus life.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, air-conditioned buses, hostels, canteens, and many other facilities are provided. Hostels are costly, but the facilities are best such as food, canteen, rooms, sports, games, Wi-Fi and many other facilities are provided to enhance students of the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a beautiful college with average facilities and below-average faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college is beautiful with a beautiful tree and a huge playground. The hostel facility is quite good. The library is also good. There is no free Wi-Fi facility for students, but you can use ethernet. The food served in a mess is very good, and everyone likes it. A new food item is served every day. Labs are good. Medical facilities are also good here.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend this college if you are looking for a good career.
reviews.review_text:
Hostel facility is quite good and the library is also good.
But free Wi-Fi is not provided. The food served in the mess is very good and everyone likes it. Every day new food item is served. Labs are also good but no teacher is skillful to teach us. Medical facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is impressive with low fee, good placements and highly qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The whole college is well-built. There is a separate section for each course with highly qualified faculty members. Labs are well maintained. Hostels are very strict, and there is no ragging. Canteen and mess are very good and hygienic. Faculty explain every topic by performing in the labs.

reviews.review_heading: Perfect location of college and all the facilities are very supportive to students.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are very supportive to the future of students and they always try to give their best to students. LIT has evergreen campus and wonderful scenario. There is also a boys and girls seperate hostel facilities are there. Apart from these there is a lack of Wi-Fi in campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is a quite good choice to have a better future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite excellent. It has well-equipped computer labs and a library which is as big as twice a classroom. There is a sports room too. It has two cafeterias which are well-cleaned. There are facilities that a student needs. There are hostels available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the over implementation of rules and regulations, but the infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge and has almost every facility here like swimming pool, hostels, canteens and mess with most hygienic food. Quality of food provided in the canteen is average, but the quality of the food in the mess is great and affordable also. The college has various labs, but certain machines and equipment aren't working.

reviews.review_heading: This college helps to learn and grow better.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are under CCTV surveillance. The library and the campus atmosphere are good. The campus is filled with good vibes. If I talk about the medical facilities, an ambulance and a doctor are available on the campus. As far as sports and games are concerned, both the indoor and outdoor games are available. The college also has a swimming pool.

college_info.college_name: South Point Institute of Technology & Management: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for South Point Institute of Technology & Management admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: South Point Institute of Technology & Management is a private institute, established in 2008 in Sonepat, Haryana. South Point Institute of Technology & Management is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 21 courses at UG and PG levels in 6 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Mechanical Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and BCA in both Full Time and Part Time modes. South Point Institute of Technology & Management fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 56,100 to 1,80,000. South Point Institute of Technology & Management has an annual seat intake of 1008 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The best infrastructure, good campus, and the teachers were very kind and helpful.

review_content.Placements: About 80 percent of students get placed at the college. The highest package offered is 25 lacs per annum, the minimum is 10 lacs per annum and the lowest package is 5 lacs per annum. Recruiters came from various companies and they selected about 60 percent of the students. Almost every student gets an internship through the course and different companies. It will help you learn how to start a business, run it and become a successful businessman.
review_content.Infrastructure: Almost every facility was on the college campus, such as the canteen or mess, Wi-Fi in every department and classrooms were well maintained and clean. All types of books were available in the college for the students and they provided books for the whole semester without any charges. The quality of food in the mess and the canteen was very good and delicious. The medical facilities were also good. Sports and games happen twice a year. Almost all types of game equipment are there and there is also a gym on the college campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is very good and beautiful.

review_content.Placements: Almost 75-80% of the students got placed in our course. The highest fee charged is Rs. 35,000 per semester, the lowest fee charged is Rs. 25,000 per semester, and the average fee charged is Rs. 30,000 per semester. HCL was the recruiting company. Almost 20-30% of the students who passed the interview got an internship in Compaq and HCL.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well-equipped with laboratories, spacious classrooms, a Wi-Fi facility and a canteen. Most importantly is there is a very beautiful and well-maintained garden, which makes the ambience amazing. The college hostel was not that good, so students paid for nearby rent rooms or PGs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: A review of South Point college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not provided by the college, especially for civil engineering students. According to my opinion, placements are a part of the college education system. Without placements, students will have no opportunities. All the students of every engineering branch are capable of getting placements, but the college does not provide the environment for it.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is good, and many students join the college every year. Infrastructure is the most important part of the education system.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good only because of our teachers and principal, who are helpful.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the placements will be held for two times during the course, but at the time of giving the job, they change all the conditions and also decrease the salary. They charge Rs.2,500 for giving the placements. At last, when the next placements were conducted, we didn't go because of these bad experiences. So, there are no good placements in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, classrooms, library, sports room are okay, but the classrooms are not air-conditioned. The library is very small. The college waiting room is also not air-conditioned. In our college, there is Jio Wi-Fi which has a limit of 34 MB.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The campus is good, and I don't have any issue.

review_content.Placements: Our college always invites the companies to the campus, and most of the students placed in those companies. It is a good college for higher studies. The college campus is good. Most of the companies visit the college and offer many jobs. The companies like Mahindra, TATA Yazaki, Samsung, etc., visit the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good. We have a noiseless environment. In our college, there is a huge building for classes. Our college has a Wi-Fi facility for students. Many labs like a computer lab, chemistry lab, electrical lab, workshop, etc., are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with good placements.

review_content.Placements: The placement here is mostly for computer science and information technology-related batches and not that much for the electronics branch. We get TCS as our core company and many other companies also do take part for selection of college students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has no hostel provision. The campus is quite small and the buildings are ragged. The campus is built on another's institute's hostel premises and is very ragged in terms of looks. The canteen food in unremarkable but the staff members are quite friendly and helpful.
